description_long: This object is a compact ASUS laptop, featuring a matte black exterior with a prominent ASUS logo centered on the back of the display lid. The screen is open and displays a green, blank surface, bordered by a black bezel with the 'Eee PC' branding in the upper left corner. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with chiclet-style keys, including a function row and arrow keys, and a touchpad centered below the keyboard. The laptop's body is slim, with visible hinges and a clean, minimalist design. No external ports or stickers are visible on the sides or palm rest area. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, libraries, or co-working spaces.
description: A sleek, black ASUS laptop with a green blank screen, chiclet keyboard, and a prominent logo on the lid. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open green screen, 'Eee PC' branding, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, open screen, and keyboard depth; no ports or stickers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a centered ASUS logo; hinges and edges are visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and open screen, similar to the left side, with no visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS logo is visible on the center of the back lid, rendered in white, with a simple, modern font.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a solid green color with no visible content or application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row, arrow keys, and standard chiclet-style keys; no numeric keypad is present.
